heading: No regulatory authority
label: 7422 No regulatory authority
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to confer any regulatory authority on any Federal, State, tribal, or local department or agency.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 113–274128 Stat. 2971section 7421 of this titleDec. 18, 2014
